heading: Establishment of Facility
label: 2431b Establishment of Facility
text: There is established in the Department of the Treasury an entity to be known as the “Conservation Facility” for the purpose of providing for the administration of debt reduction in accordance with this subchapter.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior , pt. V, was classified to prior to repeal by .section 804 of Pub. L. 87–195section 2434 of this titlePub. L. 94–329
Amendments2019— substituted “Conservation Facility” for “Tropical Forest Facility”.Pub. L. 115–440

Change of Name, , , provided that:Pub. L. 115–440, § 4(c)132 Stat. 5582Jan. 14, 2019“Any reference in any other provision of law, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the ‘Tropical Forest Facility’ shall be deemed to be a reference to the ‘Conservation Facility’.”
